# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
- name: service1
  url: http://service1.example.com
  tags:
  - service1

- name: service2
  url: http://service2.example.com
  tags:
  - service2

routes:
- name: route-service1
  paths:
  - /api/service1/
  service: service1

- name: route-service2
  paths:
  - /api/service2/
  service: service2

upstreams:
- name: upstream-service1
  hosts:
  - host: service1-backend1.example.com
    port: 80
  - host: service1-backend2.example.com
    port: 80
  loadbalancer:
    type: roundrobin

- name: upstream-service2
  hosts:
  - host: service2-backend1.example.com
    port: 80
  - host: service2-backend2.example.com
    port: 80
  loadbalancer:
    type: roundrobin

plugins:
- name: request-transformer
  config:
    add_headers:
      X-Service-Type: service1
  service: service1

- name: request-transformer
  config:
    add_headers:
      X-Service-Type: service2
  service: service2
